Package org.example.service

Class AppointmentNotificationCoordinator

java.lang.Object
org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
public class AppointmentNotificationCoordinator extends Object
Coordinates appointment notifications for business events.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AppointmentNotificationCoordinator(NotificationService notificationService)
    Creates a new appointment notification coordinator object with the given values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    sendApprovedNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends an approved notification for an approved appointment.
    void
    sendAttendedNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a notification for an attended appointment.
    void
    sendCancelledNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a cancelled notification for a cancelled or rejected appointment.
    void
    sendCompletedNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a notification for a completed appointment.
    void
    sendModifiedNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a modified notification for an updated appointment.
    void
    sendNotAttendedNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a notification for a missed appointment.
    void
    sendPendingNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a pending notification for a newly booked appointment.
    void
    sendRescheduledNotification(Appointment previousAppointment, Appointment updatedAppointment)
    Sends a detailed reschedule notification with old/new appointment details.
    void
    sendWaitlistPromotionNotification(Appointment appointment)
    Sends a notification for a waitlisted appointment that has been promoted.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppointmentNotificationCoordinator

      public AppointmentNotificationCoordinator(NotificationService notificationService)
      Creates a new appointment notification coordinator object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      notificationService - service used to send notifications

  • Method Details

    • sendPendingNotification

      public void sendPendingNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a pending notification for a newly booked appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

    • sendApprovedNotification

      public void sendApprovedNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends an approved notification for an approved appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

    • sendCancelledNotification

      public void sendCancelledNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a cancelled notification for a cancelled or rejected appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

    • sendWaitlistPromotionNotification

      public void sendWaitlistPromotionNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a notification for a waitlisted appointment that has been promoted.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

    • sendModifiedNotification

      public void sendModifiedNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a modified notification for an updated appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

    • sendRescheduledNotification

      public void sendRescheduledNotification(Appointment previousAppointment, Appointment updatedAppointment)
      Sends a detailed reschedule notification with old/new appointment details.
      Parameters:
      previousAppointment - appointment before rescheduling
      updatedAppointment - appointment after rescheduling

    • sendAttendedNotification

      public void sendAttendedNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a notification for an attended appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

      Sends a notification for a completed appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment involved in this action

      public void sendNotAttendedNotification(Appointment appointment)
      Sends a notification for a missed appointment.
